name: centaury-workflow
description: Safe branch, verification, and pull-request workflow for CentauryAI repositories.

interface.shortDescription: Safe company branch and PR workflow
interface.longDescription: Keep changes off primary branches, detect duplicate work, synchronize with the primary branch, verify changes, and merge only through a compatible pull request.
defaultPrompt: Safely start this CentauryAI task on a dedicated branch.
Check whether this work already exists before implementing it.
Verify this branch and prepare a compatible pull request.
